query: retro vintage faded film photograph melancholy nostalgia
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / muted_faded — retro film fade, nostalgic melancholy palette

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white close-up image of a person with short hair and visible tears on their cheek. The text "Porquê?" appears in white lettering at the bottom of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black-and-white close-up of a crying person with tears streaming down their cheek, their face contorted in anguish beneath prominent horizontal analog scanlines and low-resolution VHS-style degradation. The Portuguese text "Porquê?" is overlaid at the bottom of the frame, while indistinct shapes linger in the background behind the distressed subject.
